source_jobs.title: Agency Partner Manager - EMEA
source_jobs.description:
JOB POSTING

Agency Partner Manager - EMEA

Location: London, England



The Company You’ll Join

At Rebuy, we're on a mission to revolutionize shopping with intelligent, personalized experiences that wow customers around the globe. As a fully remote team, we power some of the fastest-growing DTC brands like Tecovas, Momofuku, Dime Beauty, Liquid Death, Magic Spoon, OLLY, and many more.

We believe in ownership, drive, and empathy, and strongly uphold that every team member plays a vital role in shaping the future of intelligent commerce. Our culture thrives on collaboration, creativity, and genuine passion. We don’t just build great tech - we build lasting partnerships, a strong community, and a place where people love to work.

The Team You’ll Join

We're a tight-knit, driven team that’s obsessed with teamwork and excellence. In this role, you’ll be reporting to our General Manager of EMEA.

 - Customer Alignment: We are deeply committed to understanding and addressing the unique needs of our customers (merchants and partners). We strive to build strong, long-lasting relationships with our clients.

 - Product & Craft Mastery: We strive to be masters of our product and its use cases, always seeking to understand and optimize its potential. We also prioritize operational excellence, continuously refining our processes and skills to deliver efficient and impactful solutions.

 - Empower Your Network: We foster a collaborative and supportive work environment where everyone is empowered to contribute and grow. Our network includes both our valued customers and our talented colleagues within Rebuy.

 - Work Smart and Hard: We are dedicated to working efficiently and effectively, always striving for results. We believe in a strong work ethic and a balanced approach to achieving our goals.




The Problems You’ll Solve

We are looking for a talented multi-disciplinarian to join the Rebuy team as an Agency Partner Manager to execute our go-to-market strategy for the Rebuy Partnerships organization. As a member of the Partnerships organization you will be responsible for owning and growing a portfolio of revenue-generating, strategic B2B partners within the Shopify ecosystem. These partners specialize in digital commerce, marketing, and systems integrations and play a critical role in driving new business, expansion, and long-term growth for Rebuy.

You will lead the strategy and execution of key partnerships, initiatives, and alliances that expand the business, while collaborating cross-functionally across Sales, Product, Marketing, and Merchant Success to deliver on partner goals and their clients’ needs. This role will also have ownership over new partnership initiatives, ensuring partners are enabled, motivated, and positioned to drive measurable revenue impact.



What you’ll do

 - Establish and manage relationships with a portfolio of agency partners in the Shopify ecosystem, covering all of EMEA

 - Build and execute a strategy with those Agency partners to create mutual value with a focus on acquiring new merchants and expanding revenue with existing merchants

 - Collaborate with the sales team to both develop a pipeline of merchant prospects through your partner portfolio to achieve lead generation and revenue targets and close new opportunities and set up accounts for revenue expansion

 - Activate and enable partners with 1:1 training and project support to drive effective implementations of Rebuy geared to experimental growth strategies

 - Engage with marketing and partners to develop co-marketing and awareness efforts jointly through digital and in-real-life events

What You Bring

We’re stoked to meet you and get to learn more about you, your experience, and your interest in joining our team.

Required experience and mindset

 - Bachelor's degree or equivalent work experience

 - Typically 3+ years of Channel Sales, Business Development, or Partner Management within the Shopify, or similar, ecosystem

 - Strong demon

source_jobs.title: VP, Product
source_jobs.description:
The Company You’ll Join

At Rebuy, we're on a mission to revolutionize shopping with intelligent, personalized experiences that wow customers around the globe. As a fully remote team, we power some of the fastest growing DTC brands like Tecovas, Momofuku, Dime Beauty, Liquid Death, Magic Spoon, OLLY, and many more.

We believe in ownership, drive, and empathy and strongly uphold that every team member plays a vital role in shaping the future of intelligent commerce. Our culture thrives on collaboration, creativity, and genuine passion. We don’t just build great tech - we build lasting partnerships, a strong community, and a place where people love to work.

The Role

You own product vision and execution for rebuyengine.com http://rebuyengine.com and the Monetize commerce-media engine. You will lead the Product Owner and Design organizations, partner with the VP of Engineering on delivery, and partner with the CRO on all go-to-market strategies. You will reshape the product organization into pods (PO + Designer + 4–6 engineers) and set the API-first roadmap that defines how Rebuy serves both the human shopper and the agentic shopper on the same engine.



What You’ll Do:

Product Strategy & Vision

 - Define the Roadmap: Translate the company’s border business goals into a coherent, actionable product strategy and timeline.

 - Market Differentiation: Analyze competitive landscapes and emerging market trends to keep the software innovative and highly valued.

 - Business Case Modeling: Ensure that product development maximizes Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) like revenue, churn reduction, and lifetime value.

 - Set and own the rebuyengine.com http://rebuyengine.com product roadmap — the API surface, the onsite UX, the Monetize media network

Team Leadership & Scaling

 - Team Development: Hire, mentor, and manage a team of product managers, UX/UI designers, and potentially data analysts. Lead and grow the Product Owner and Design teams; establish the pod model and operating rhythm.

 - Product Culture: Foster an environment focused on continuous discovery, user testing, rapid iteration, and data-driven decision making.

Cross-Functional Alignment

 - Engineering Collaboration: Partner with Engineering to ensure the product roadmap is technically feasible and ships reliably.

 - Go-to-market (GTM) Alignment: Work closely with Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success teams to arm them with the messaging, pricing, and feature readiness needed for successful product launches.

Customer Advocacy & Data Analytics

 - Championing the Customer: Ensure that user feedback, pain points, and data analytics are central to product decision making.

 - Measuring Success: Establish and monitor product metrics (such as feature adoption rates, daily active users, and Net Promoter Score) to evaluate product performance. Other KPIs include Net Revenue Retention, Expansion, and Activation.

Who You Are

We're excited to meet you and get to learn more about you, your experience and your interest in joining our team.


THE HARD SKILLS

 - 10+ years in product leadership; at least one tour scaling a $20M+ ARR SaaS product

 - Deep experience in ecommerce, Shopify ecosystem, or martech

 - API-first / developer-experience mindset — you've shipped products as APIs, not just UIs

 - Strong design partnership; you treat Design as a peer function, not a service org

 - Comfortable operating in an exit-process posture with discretion

 - Vast experience with data intensive products


THE SOFT SKILLS

 - Strong communication skills and ability to break down complex problems into easy-to-understand concepts.

 - Be a leader by example

 - Someone who carries a positive attitude, loves to be a problem-solver, is naturally self-motivated, and passionate about ecommerce.

Who You’ll Meet With

Now let's get into who you'll meet during our interview process! After you submit your application and it's been reviewed by our team, we will reach out to you inviting y

source_jobs.title: VP, Engineering
source_jobs.description:
The Company You’ll Join

At Rebuy, we're on a mission to revolutionize shopping with intelligent, personalized experiences that wow customers around the globe. As a fully remote team, we power some of the fastest growing DTC brands like Tecovas, Momofuku, Dime Beauty, Liquid Death, Magic Spoon, OLLY, and many more.

We believe in ownership, drive, and empathy and strongly uphold that every team member plays a vital role in shaping the future of intelligent commerce. Our culture thrives on collaboration, creativity, and genuine passion. We don’t just build great tech - we build lasting partnerships, a strong community, and a place where people love to work.

The Role

As the VP of Engineering, you will own the engineering organization and the technical delivery of rebuyengine.com http://rebuyengine.com. You will lead the engineering pods (4–6 engineers each, one team captain per pod) and partner with the VP of Product on the roadmap and with the CEO/COO on operational execution. One of the main objectives will be to deliver the 2nd version of the API-first surface — the standardized REST tool set that makes Rebuy the cleanest API in the Shopify ecosystem for agents to call.

What You’ll Do:

 - Set engineering strategy, own technical architecture, direction and the bar for code, reliability, and security

 - Lead and grow the engineering organization; install the pod operating model, handle organizational design, and establish career progression paths

 - Ship the V2 REST API surface, the OpenAPI spec, and the agent-readiness layer

 - Own engineering KPIs: delivery velocity, system reliability, defect density, hiring quality

 - Partner on diligence-readiness — repo hygiene, IP assignment, security posture — for a strategic transaction.

 - Partner with the Product team to define technical vision, architecture standards, and product delivery roadmaps

 - Own the performance metrics for Rebuyengine (latency, errors, etc).

 - Responsible for all platform security

 - Review and optimize our entire tech stack, also assess all critical points of failure to add redundancies as needed.

 - Responsible for shipping high quality code.

Who You Are

We're looking for an experienced engineering executive who combines deep technical expertise with exceptional leadership skills. You're passionate about building world-class engineering organizations, developing high-performing teams, and delivering technology that drives meaningful business outcomes.


THE HARD SKILLS

 - 15+ years in engineering leadership; have led 30–50 person engineering organizations

 - Experience scaling SaaS platforms in ecommerce, martech, or developer tools

 - Proven success scaling high-growth SaaS platforms with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, and operational excellence.

 - Deep expertise in software architecture, distributed systems, APIs, cloud infrastructure, and platform engineering.

 - Experience building API-first products and developer platforms using modern REST and OpenAPI standards.

 - Strong understanding of modern software development practices, CI/CD, DevOps, observability, incident management, and engineering operations.

 - Experience optimizing application performance, platform latency, database performance, cloud infrastructure, and large-scale distributed systems.

 - Strong opinions on API design and developer experience — OpenAPI, REST conventions, agent-tool patterns

 - Modern stack fluency (PHP/Node/React/Shopify ecosystem helpful)

 - Comfortable operating in an exit-process posture with discretion

 - Vast experience with large data sets and must be a database expert


THE SOFT SKILLS

 - Strong communication skills and ability to break down complex problems into easy-to-understand concepts.

 - Executive presence with the ability to inspire confidence, influence decision-making, and build trust across the organization.

 - Exceptional communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into cl

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Customer Support Engineer

Join our Customer Support team in shaping the future of AI-powered shopping experiences across our global software platform.



The Company You’ll Join

At Rebuy, we're on a mission to revolutionize shopping with intelligent, personalized experiences that wow customers around the globe. As a fully remote team, we power some of the fastest growing DTC brands like Tecovas, Momofuku, Dime Beauty, Liquid Death, Magic Spoon, OLLY, and many more.

We believe in ownership, drive, and empathy and strongly uphold that every team member plays a vital role in shaping the future of intelligent commerce. Our culture thrives on collaboration, creativity, and genuine passion. We don’t just build great tech - we build lasting partnerships, a strong community, and a place where people love to work.



The Team You’ll Join

We're a tight-knit, driven team that’s obsessed with team work and excellence. In this role, you’ll be reporting to our Team Lead of Customer Support Operations. If you thrive on curiosity, crave a challenge, and never stop learning, you’ll feel right at home here. Our flat structure means no red tape, just real impact. Everyone rolls up their sleeves and contributes directly to our mission.

We reward initiative, celebrate high performance, and believe leadership is earned through action. Strong work ethic, smart prioritization, and clear communication are must-haves. Whether you're flying solo or teaming up across departments and with customers, you'll play a key role in moving us forward.



The Problems You’ll Solve

Rebuy and its team members continually strive to create a high-spirited, intentional work environment that stresses performance productivity as well as collaboration and merit.

As an Overnight Customer Support Engineer, you’ll be a crucial team member as you create long-term solutions and remove roadblocks for our merchants and partners! Your day to day (6:00 pm ET - 2:00 am ET) will be expertly troubleshooting and supporting our core feature sets and services, assisting issues from our merchants and partners, and creating incredible interactions and moments with our internal and external teams. If you’re excited about jumping into ecommerce and being an accelerator in a fast-paced startup, this role is for you!

 - Providing technical support for Merchants and Partners through our internal ticketing system.

 - Creating new documentation or updating existing documentation as required.

 - Preparing reports on technical issues that require further investigation or action by other departments within the company.

 - Resolving complex technical issues by analyzing problems, testing solutions, and recommending changes to existing systems.

 - Installing new software and upgrading existing software to ensure that it continues to function properly.

 - Coordinating with other departments within the company to ensure that any issues are addressed quickly and efficiently.

 - Troubleshooting problems with software programs and networks to identify and resolve issues.

 - Suggesting improvements in work processes, procedures, or policies to increase efficiency and productivity.



Who You Are

We’re stoked to meet you and get to learn more about you, your experience and your interest in joining our team.

The Hard Skills:

 - BS degree or equivalent work experience.

 - At least 1-3 years of relevant work experience in a JavaScript environment.

 - Experience with frontend frameworks (e.g. React, Vue, Angular) and performant SaaS environment.

 - Comfortable understanding of HTML and browser development tools for debugging, testing, and optimizing.

 - It’s a bonus if you’ve got experience in: remote work environments, start-ups, SaaS or managed services, Atlassian // Jira, Scrum // Agile, and omni-channel support (customer chat).

The Soft Skills:

 - Incredible customer service skills to blow all of us away.

 - Excellent listening, communication and interpersonal skills, both written a

notes: Remote team, AI-powered shopping experiences, DTC brands
